cd /workspace/game-2048 && python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
path = Path('src/game/logic.test.ts')
text = path.read_text()
text = text.replace("    const result = applyMove(board, 'left', () => 0.55);
", "    const result = applyMove(board, 'left', () => 0);
")
text = text.replace("      [4, 4, 0, 0],
      [8, 0, 0, 0],
      [4, 4, 0, 0],
      [0, 2, 0, 0],
", "      [4, 4, 2, 0],
      [8, 0, 0, 0],
      [4, 4, 0, 0],
      [0, 0, 0, 0],
")
path.write_text(text)
PY
npm test && npm run build
